name: Bloody Feast
descriptionTemplate: Team Unique: The Crit. Rate and Crit. DMG of the wielder's Exalt are increased by [StateArg2]%. After the wielder releases Exalt, they gain {STR} equal to their CON [StateArg1]%. If this Exalt triggers the {Devour} effect, they gain additional 1 instance of {STR}.
